indicator.title: Other marginally attached workers
indicator.notes: BLS CPS reasons-other-than-discouragement marginally attached series; only the not-seasonally-adjusted `LNU05026648` series validated on 2026-06-03, while `LNS15026648` does not exist.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
January 2026 estimates were revised to incorporate updated population controls. For more information, see www.bls.gov/cps/documentation.htm#pop.
